meta.title: OlonJS — The Contract Layer for the Agentic Web
meta.description: OlonJS standardizes machine-readable web content across tenants. Predictable page endpoints for agents, typed schema contracts, repeatable governance.

data.title: Start building
data.description: AI agents are becoming operational actors in commerce, marketing, and support. But websites are still built for humans first: HTML-heavy, CMS-fragmented, and inconsistent across properties. That makes agent integration slow, brittle, and expensive. Olon introduces a deterministic machine contract for websites OlonJS. This makes content reliably readable and operable by agents while preserving normal human UI.

data.label: Why OlonJS
data.sectionLead: Built on the concept of the holon — every component autonomous yet part of the larger contract. Governance and developer experience, unified.

cards.title: Canonical JSON endpoints
cards.description: Every page available at /{slug}.json — deterministic, typed, agent-readable. No custom integration per tenant.

cards.title: Schema-driven contracts
cards.description: Typed components validated against your schema. Shared conventions eliminate prompt ambiguity across teams.

cards.title: AI-native velocity
cards.description: Structure is deterministic, so AI can scaffold and evolve tenants faster. Ship new experiences in hours, not weeks.

cards.title: Multi-tenant at scale
cards.description: One convention across many tenants enables reusable automations. No per-tenant custom integration work.

cards.title: Enterprise governance
cards.description: Audit trails, compliance controls, and private cloud deployment via NX monorepo. SOC2-ready by design.

cards.title: Deployment flexibility
cards.description: OSS core you can trust. Vercel-native cloud for speed. Private cloud for governance-heavy orgs.

data.proofStatement: Working end-to-end with production routing parity.
data.proofSub: Early customer usage across real tenant deployments · Clear hardening path to enterprise-grade governance.

data.label: Contact
data.title: Ready to define
data.description: Whether you're running a single tenant or deploying enterprise-grade governance across dozens of properties — let's talk.
data.successBody: We'll respond within one business day.
data.disclaimer: No spam. Unsubscribe at any time.
